extractionLimitations: Extraction was performed from uploaded workbook XML. Live repo workbook binaries were not independently downloaded in this session, but the user stated both files are also saved at docs/reference/example/.
Live web research was not available in this ChatGPT session; research summary is pattern-based and the prompts require the local agent/fresh reviewer to complete live web research before repo edits.
